title: General Dynamics Vs. Raytheon: Be Defensive, Buy Defense

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins $147M Deal for Stryker Vehicle
text: General Dynamics' (GD) Land System business unit is a prime contractor of land combat vehicles like Stryker, for which the company recently won a $147 million deal

title: General Dynamics (GD) Wins Contract to Support Submarines

title: 3 Aerospace-Defense Stocks to Watch as U.S. Dollar Rallies
text: Stocks in the aerospace-defense industry are being affected by strengthening U.S. dollar and supply chain constraints amid recovering traffic data. One may keep GD, ACHR, SPIR on their watchlist

title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why General Dynamics Corporation (GD) is a Trending Stock
